critic_findings.message: WRITE_DESTRUCTIVE imported in a second standalone import block when it could be merged into the existing @arqu-co/rq-tools import at line 15. Not dead, but the split is unnecessary style drift from other register files.

No 5xx / UPSTREAM_ERROR test case. shareable_assets_list has 7 tests including a malformed-upstream path; revoke has 4 and skips 5xx coverage entirely. A server-error reply (500) is the most common failure mode for a DELETE and should be exercised.
